hero.subtitle: 700+ apartments delivered. See your future home in 3D before we touch a wall. One team handles everything — from design to keys in hand.

services_section.title: Our Services
services_section.renovation_desc: Give your apartment the second life it deserves. Electrical, plumbing, flooring, paint — we handle it all. You just pick up the keys.
services_section.construction_desc: New builds and reconstructions done right. Concrete, facades, roofing — professional results at every stage.
services_section.furniture_desc: Off-the-shelf furniture never quite fits. We build pieces to your exact measurements and taste. From sketch to installation.

process.title: How we work
process.step1_desc: Before starting, we thoroughly evaluate your goals, preferences, budget and timeline.
process.step2_desc: Our team creates initial design concepts and mood boards based on your preferences.
process.step3_desc: Following the approved plan, our professional team of craftsmen carries out the renovation.
process.step4_desc: We finalize the selection of furniture, electronics, lighting and bathroom accessories to match the design.
process.step5_desc: We provide the ability to track your renovation progress online in real time.
process.step6_desc: Experience your transformed space and enjoy the final walkthrough with our team.

cta.title: Design service discount — limited time
cta.subtitle: Apply now — get a free measurement and 3D visualization of your future home.

about.title: About Us
about.story: We started in 2016 with a simple belief: everyone in Baku deserves a home they love. Since then, we have delivered over 700 apartments. Each project is not just a renovation for us — it is a new chapter in a family's life.
about.mission: We believe a beautiful home is the beginning of a beautiful life. That is why we design every detail around your vision — functional, aesthetic, and built to last.
about.why1: 10+ years of experience — not just a number, it is a mark of trust
about.why2: 700+ completed projects — each one backed by a grateful family
about.why3: From idea to keys — one company, full service, zero headaches
about.why4: See the result before we start — 3D visualization means no surprises

services_page.title: Our Services
services_page.subtitle: One company — from design to furniture installation
services_page.renovation_full: Your apartment looks dated, but the potential is enormous. We handle everything from demolition to the final coat of paint. Electrical, plumbing, flooring, decorative finishes — all from one team. You relax. We take care of it.
services_page.construction_full: Professional construction services for new builds and reconstructions. From concrete work to facades, from roofing to flooring — quality materials and an experienced crew.
services_page.furniture_full: Buying furniture off the shelf is easy. But furniture that fits your space perfectly — that is a different level. Kitchens, wardrobes, bedrooms, offices — everything built to your measurements. From design to installation.

projects_page.title: Our Projects
projects_page.subtitle: Before & after examples from completed projects in Baku

footer.description: Interior design, renovation and custom furniture in Baku — 10+ years of experience
